payload.answer: I can’t save this as a durable memory yet because it’s unclear who “he” is and what “the other one” refers to. Please rewrite it with the person and item named explicitly.

entity_resolution.reason: The proposed memory uses unresolved references ('He' and 'the other one'), so it is not clear who the memory is about or what preference should be stored.

details: Memory not saved due to unresolved pronouns and ambiguous object reference.
User selected Rewrite memory, so clarification/rewrite is required before committing.

repair_options: Rewrite with the person’s name, e.g. “Alex prefers tea over coffee.”
Rewrite with both options named, e.g. “Sam prefers the blue notebook instead of the red one.”
